title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin presents a practical architecture for integrating Claude Code into large codebases, arguing that the harness (AI context, config, tooling) matters more than the model itself. He demonstrates building an "AI Layer" with components including CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and plugins.
